page_content:
ENAE100 The Aerospace Engineering Profession (1 Credit)

Overview of salient aspects of professional practice of Aerospace Engineering. Introduction to the range of technical expertise needed

to succeed in the profession and the objectives of the various parts of the Aerospace Engineering program at UMCP in supporting students’ efforts in gaining the required knowledge and skills. Familiarization with departmental faculty and their areas of research, creation of links with other students, professional society student chapters, and available resources. Discussion of ethical issues, business requirements, and their interactions with technical developments.

Recommended: ENES100 and MATH140.
